summary: Comprehensive testing of Chroma Key Protocol v5 - 5-Step Protocol Engine, Access Tier System, Spin Wheel Gating, Admin Settings. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including protocol engine for all 4 acts, tier-based gating, spin wheel with earned spins, and admin settings tab.
passed_tests: Backend: Login returns new user fields (tier, spins_earned, spins_used, owns_all_albums)
Backend: Admin user has tier=full, owns_all_albums=true
Backend: GET /api/protocol/steps/{act} returns saved steps
Backend: POST /api/protocol/steps/{act}/{step} saves step data correctly
Backend: POST /api/protocol/complete-act/{act} requires all 5 steps completed
Backend: GET /api/spins returns spin count (earned, used, available)
Backend: POST /api/spins/use decrements available spins
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns addon_price
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings updates addon_price
Backend: GET /api/settings/public returns addon_price
Backend: New user registration creates tier=free, spins_earned=0, owns_all_albums=false
Backend: POST /api/protocol/chat requires authentication
Frontend: Login with test@demo.com/password123 works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 Act cards with proper gating
Frontend: Act I accessible for free users (Enter button works)
Frontend: Acts II-IV show 'Locked' for free users with unlock prompt
Frontend: Act IV shows 'Sealed' / 'Coming Soon'
Frontend: Protocol page /protocol/1 renders 5-step engine with header, step nav, sliders, lyrics, exercise blocks
Frontend: Protocol page /protocol/3 (Act III) renders with Fire element theme and Prometheus agent
Frontend: Step navigation (5 pips) works - clicking navigates between steps
Frontend: Domain sliders exercise renders with Fire Index metric
Frontend: Checklist exercise renders with Burn Score Inventory
Frontend: Textarea for reflection exists and accepts input
Frontend: 'Transmit to Prometheus' button exists for Act III
Frontend: Advance button 'Proceed to Step II' works
Frontend: Agent panel shows correct agent name per act (Terra for Act I, Prometheus for Act III)
Frontend: Spin Wheel page shows 12 bonus track segments
Frontend: Spin Wheel shows 'Admin · Unlimited spins' for admin user
Frontend: Spin button works and wheel animates
Frontend: Spin result appears with track name and share buttons
Frontend: Admin Panel Settings tab renders with pricing tiers
Frontend: Settings tab shows $29.99 Full Access and $17.99 License Key tiers
Frontend: Addon price input exists and can be modified
Frontend: Save Settings button persists addon_price
Frontend: Access Summary table shows feature comparison across tiers
critical_code_review_comments: ActProtocol.js implements complete 5-step protocol engine with all exercise types (domain_sliders, checklist, pills, witness_sliders, declaration)
actDefinitions.js contains full definitions for all 4 acts with step exercises and agent prompts
Dashboard.js correctly implements tier-based gating - Act I free, Acts II-IV require license/full tier
SpinWheel.js tracks spins_earned/spins_used and disables spin for non-admin users with 0 spins
AdminPanel.js Settings tab shows pricing tiers ($29.99 full, $17.99 license) and addon_price configuration
Backend server.py has complete endpoints for protocol steps, act completion, spins, and admin settings
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test free user for gating verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5 features tested: 1) 5-Step Protocol Engine at /protocol/{actNum} with all exercise types (domain_sliders, checklist, pills, witness_sliders, declaration), step navigation, agent panel, transmit button, advance button. 2) Access tier system - free users get Act I only, license ($17.99) and full ($29.99) tiers unlock all acts. 3) Spin wheel gating - spins earned by completing acts, admin has unlimited spins. 4) Admin Settings tab with pricing tiers display and addon_price configuration. Protocol chat uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (may return 402 on budget exceeded).

notes.protocol_engine_llm: Uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library. Budget exceeded error (402) is expected and handled gracefully.
notes.tier_system: Free=Act I only, License($17.99)=All acts+streaming+Act III ownership, Full($29.99)=Everything+all album ownership
notes.spin_system: Spins earned by completing acts (1 spin per act). Admin users have unlimited spins.
